props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Optionally add a close button to alert and allow it to self dismiss.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be closed.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the alert variant to a solid.
